title: Plugins & Skills
storeSubtitle: Online catalog not included in this release
storeDisabled: Online skill discovery is not included in this release. Install only skills whose source and license you have reviewed.
connectorErrorNotFound: The connector could not be found
connectorErrorNotCustom: Only custom connectors can be removed
connectorErrorApprovalNotRequired: This connector does not require local startup approval
connectorErrorEnableRequired: Enable the connector before approving its local process
connectorErrorCommandChanged: The local launch configuration changed; review it again
connectorErrorApprovalPersistence: Local startup approval could not be saved safely
connectorErrorApprovalConnect: Approval was saved, but the connector did not connect
connectorErrorGoogleOauth: Use the Google Workspace authorization flow for this connector
connectorErrorTokenUnsupported: This connector does not accept a personal token
connectorErrorPersonalTokenRequired: This connector requires a personal token instead of OAuth
connectorErrorOauthDiscovery: The connector's OAuth service could not be discovered
localApprovalRequired: This local process has not been approved to start
localApprovalUnavailable: Local approval state is unavailable; inspect the app data
localApprovalReview: Review the local command, working directory, environment, and fingerprint
